name: Clarifai API
description: Clarifai provides AI-powered visual recognition, NLP, and general ML model inference. The API supports predictions (image classification, object detection, text analysis), model management, input management, search, and workflow orchestration. The API is accessible via gRPC and HTTP+JSON channels. Authentication uses Personal Access Tokens (PAT) or API keys.
